ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_conversion" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion record */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size in the primary standard (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L) */,
  "size_system" TEXT /* Primary size system (e.g., EUR, FR, IT, UK, DE) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size is applicable (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the clothing (e.g., T-shirt, Jeans, Dress) */,
  "esp_fr" INTEGER /* Equivalent size in the ESP/FR standard */,
  "it" INTEGER /* Equivalent size in the IT standard */,
  "uk" INTEGER /* Equivalent size in the UK standard */,
  "de" INTEGER /* Equivalent size in the DE standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., T-shirt, Jeans, Dress) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is denominated */,
  "size_system" TEXT /* Primary size system for the product */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the product is intended */,
  "size_chart_url" TEXT /* URL to a size chart for the product */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the product description is written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant (if applicable) */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the product is available */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product size in stock */,
  "online_availability" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the product size is available online */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the variant */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the variant */,
  "size_chart_url" TEXT /* URL to a size chart for the variant */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variants_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the order was placed */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the order was placed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product size */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product size ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product size at the time of order */,
  "size_system" TEXT /* Size system of the ordered product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication */,
  "preferred_size_system" TEXT /* Preferred size system for product recommendations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer, warehouse staff) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language for the user interface */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
